metadata.notes: Cards matched by cardId (Set_Number) when provided, otherwise by name+subtitle. Restricted = max 1 copy. Suspended = banned for Organized Play.

premier.description: Standard 50-card deck with set rotation. Newest sets remain legal until rotated out.

eternal.description: All sets legal. No rotation. Same 50-card structure as Premier.

twinSuns.description: 80-card singleton format with exactly 2 Leaders. Leaders cannot combine both Heroism and Villainy aspects.

trilogy.description: Three separate 50-card decks. Max 3 copies of any card across all three decks combined. Different leader and base per deck.
